panelProfile.title: Your profile
panelProfile.description: Manage the name shown across your TrackDraw account.

panelSecurity.title: Security
panelSecurity.description: Manage sign-in methods, account email, and passkeys for your TrackDraw account.

panelApiKeys.title: API keys
panelApiKeys.description: Create and revoke expiring keys for external TrackDraw integrations.

security.emailChangeDescription: After saving, we will send a confirmation to your current email address first. Once confirmed, you will verify the new one.
security.passkeysDescription: Add a passkey for faster sign-in on supported devices.
security.devAuthUnavailable: Passkeys are not available in `npm run dev`. Use `npm run preview` to test the real auth flow locally.
security.reauthDescription: Passkey setup requires a recent sign-in. You can stay signed in for normal work, but this security action needs confirmation.
security.unsupportedBrowser: This browser does not currently expose WebAuthn here, so passkey setup is unavailable on this device.
security.emptyDescription: Add one to make sign-in quicker on your trusted devices.
security.renameDescription: This only changes how the passkey is labeled in your TrackDraw account.

apiKeys.createdDescription: This secret is shown once. Store it before closing this dialog.
apiKeys.emptyDescription: Create one when a trusted integration needs read-only access to your account projects.
apiKeys.revokeWarningNonExpiring: Integrations using this key lose read-only access.

danger.description: Deleting your account removes account projects, published links, API keys, and other account-backed data. Export anything account-backed that you want to keep before continuing.

shared.signInTitle: Sign in to manage your account
shared.signInBody: Use your email to access cloud-backed account settings and profile details.

errors.profileNameRequired: Please enter the name you want TrackDraw to show.
errors.deleteConfirmRequired: Type DELETE to confirm account deletion.
errors.emailRequired: Please enter the email you want to use for TrackDraw.
errors.emailSame: Enter a different email address to change it.
errors.passkeyNameRequired: Please enter a passkey name before saving.
errors.apiKeyNameRequired: Enter a name for this API key.

success.passkeyAdded: Passkey added. You can rename or remove it below.

export.dialogSubtitle: Export the current track as visual assets, project handoff files, or simulator-ready outputs.
export.view3dUnavailable: 3D view not available — open the 3D tab first
export.webmRenderingBackground: Cinematic FPV is rendering in the background…

visualExports.title: Visual Exports
visualExports.description: Read-only captures for review, print, or sharing.

projectHandoff.title: Project & Handoff
projectHandoff.description: Editable backup or read-only setup handoff.

simulatorMotion.title: Simulator & Motion
simulatorMotion.description: Review video and experimental simulator output.

image.label: Image
image.descriptionFull: High-res 2D map for print, slides, chat, or quick review.
image.descriptionShort: High-res 2D map for print, chat, or review.

vector.label: Vector
vector.descriptionFull: Scalable artwork for Illustrator, Figma, or Inkscape edits.
vector.descriptionShort: Scalable artwork for Illustrator, Figma, or Inkscape.

render3d.label: 3D Render
render3d.descriptionFull: Screenshot of the current 3D camera view for visual review.
render3d.descriptionShort: Current 3D camera screenshot for visual review.

projectFile.label: Project File
projectFile.descriptionFull: Editable backup for reopening, sharing, or archiving in TrackDraw.
projectFile.descriptionShort: Editable backup for reopening or archiving in TrackDraw.

racePack.label: Race Pack
racePack.descriptionFull: Race-day setup handoff with map, materials, sequence, and QR.
racePack.descriptionShort: Setup PDF with map, materials, sequence, and QR.

cinematicFpv.label: Cinematic FPV
cinematicFpv.descriptionFull: One-loop route video for reviewing the flow or sharing the lap.
cinematicFpv.descriptionShort: One-loop route video for reviewing the flow.

velocidrone.label: Velocidrone
velocidrone.descriptionFull: Experimental Velocidrone track file for testing in the simulator; check the layout after import.
velocidrone.descriptionShort: Experimental file for testing; check after import.

import.dialogSubtitle: Import a TrackDraw project from a JSON file.
import.errorInvalidProject: This does not look like a TrackDraw project.
import.errorUnsupportedFile: Only TrackDraw JSON project files are supported.
import.errorReadFailed: TrackDraw could not read this file.
import.toastUnsupportedFile: Choose a .json file exported from TrackDraw.
import.toastInvalidJson: TrackDraw could not read this JSON file. Check the file and try again.
import.toastInvalidProject: Choose a JSON project file exported from TrackDraw.
import.toastReadFailed: TrackDraw could not read the selected file. Try again or choose another backup.
import.replaceWarning: The current project will be replaced. Export a JSON backup first if you want a manual restore point outside local autosave.

share.dialogMobileSubtitle: Share a read-only review link for this track

gallery.featuredDesc: Visible in the public gallery and pinned near the top.
gallery.hiddenDesc: Hidden by moderation. The direct link still works until it is revoked.
gallery.linkOnlyDesc: Share link only. Not visible in the public gallery.
gallery.publishFirstDescription: The gallery uses the current published snapshot, so a share link is required before this track can be listed.
gallery.moderationLockDescription: This track is hidden from the gallery by moderation. The direct share link can still work until it is revoked.
gallery.detailsDescription: Update the title and description shown on the public gallery card.
gallery.listDescription: Add a title, description and generated preview for public browsing.
gallery.descriptionPlaceholder: Short description for the gallery card
gallery.refreshShareFirst: Update the share link first so the gallery uses the latest snapshot.
gallery.displayNameRequired: Set an account display name first.
gallery.noMetadataChanges: Update the title or description to save changes.
gallery.cardDescription: Review or update the public title and description for this track.
gallery.removeConfirm: Remove from the public gallery? The share link itself will continue to work until it is revoked.
gallery.readyDescription: Add this published snapshot to the public gallery with its own title, description and preview.

content.shareDescExisting: Copy or resend this published read-only link, or open Studio to make your own editable copy.
content.shareDescAccount: Create or update the durable read-only link for this account project.
content.shareDescSeparate: Create a separate durable read-only link for this editable copy or local track.
content.shareDescAnon: Create a temporary read-only snapshot link and control how long it stays active.
content.galleryDesc: Manage how this published link appears in the public gallery.
content.embedDesc: Copy iframe code for an account-published track that stays live until revoked.
content.actionsDescExisting: Use the current published link in other apps or reopen it in a new tab.
content.actionsDesc: Open, resend, revoke, or export this share without changing the track itself.

errors.unableToReadLink: Unable to read the current share link

link.savedProjectDescription: This saved account project uses one durable read-only link. Updating it keeps the same URL with the latest design.
link.newShareDescription: This editable copy gets its own durable read-only link. It will not update another project's published link.
link.lifetimePublished: Published link on {hostname}, stays live until revoked
link.lifetimeTemporary: Read-only snapshot on {hostname}, expires in {days} days
link.createSavedProject: Create one durable URL for this account project. Future updates can keep the same link.
link.createSeparate: Create a durable URL for this copy without changing any earlier share.
link.createTemporary: Choose when it expires and create a read-only snapshot.
link.outdatedDesign: This link no longer reflects the latest design.
link.outdatedExpiry: This link no longer reflects the latest expiry selection.

embed.codeDescription: Account-published tracks can be embedded on club or event sites.
embed.publishBeforeEmbeddingDescription: Embeds use the durable account-published link, so create the published link before copying iframe code.
embed.temporaryLinksCannotEmbedDescription: Sign in and publish this track from your account to create a durable embed.
embed.refreshFirst: Update the published link first so the embed uses the latest design.
embed.layout2dDescription: Open as the flat field plan

actions.existingDescription: This page is already the published read-only review link. Share it as-is, or open Studio if you want an editable copy.
actions.withPathDescription: Shared links open as read-only review pages. This link opens straight into {view} review, and the route is ready for fly-through.
actions.withoutPathDescription: Shared links open as read-only review pages. Add a path first if you want reviewers to use fly-through and elevation review.
actions.reopenCurrent: Reopen the current shared link in a new tab
actions.previewLink: Preview the share link in a new window
actions.exportJsonDescription: Editable backup for reopening in TrackDraw

labels.temporarySnapshotsExpire: Temporary snapshots stay available until they expire.

panelDevice.label: On this device
panelDevice.description: Local copies saved on this device. Synced projects can also appear in Account.

panelAccount.label: Account projects
panelAccount.description: Account copies available on your signed-in devices. Open one here to refresh this browser.

panelSnapshots.label: Snapshots
panelSnapshots.description: Earlier saved states of the current project. Restore any point to roll back changes.

panelShares.label: Published shares
panelShares.description: Active share links published from your account. Copy, open or revoke them here.

sync.conflictDescription: This project changed on another device. Review the version before continuing.
sync.failedDescription: The last sync failed. Try sending the latest local version again.
sync.pendingDescription: Push the latest local changes to your account.
sync.updateDescription: Replace the synced account copy with this device version.
sync.description: Make this project available on your signed-in devices.
sync.localChangesWaiting: Local changes are waiting to sync
sync.changedOnAnotherDevice: This project changed on another device

actions.newProjectDescription: Start a fresh track or use a starter layout.
actions.cleanUpLocalDescription: Remove older copies from this device only.
actions.renameDescription: Give this project a clearer name.

export.jsonDescription: Download this project as a reusable TrackDraw file.

delete.permanentlyDescription: This only removes the local project from this browser.
delete.localProjectActionDescription: Remove this local project from the device.
delete.removeLocalProjectsTitle: Remove {count, plural, one {# local project} other {# local projects}}?
delete.accountSyncedCopiesStayAvailable: Account-synced copies stay available in your account.

empty.noProjectsDescription: Projects you save will appear here.

account.noProjectsDesc: Sync a project to make it available across devices.
account.conflictWarning: This project changed on another device while you were signed out
account.syncError: Could not sync the latest changes

restore.noSnapshotsDesc: Snapshots are created automatically when you open or replace a project.
restore.noSnapshotsDesktopDesc: Press <kbdMeta>⌘S</kbdMeta> / <kbdCtrl>Ctrl S</kbdCtrl> or use the save button in the header.

shares.readOnlyReviewLinks: Shares are read-only review links. Export JSON when someone needs an editable TrackDraw backup.
shares.noSharesDesc: Account-published links stay live until revoked. Temporary anonymous links expire automatically and are not managed here.
shares.expiresInDays: {days, plural, one {1 day left} other {# days left}}
shares.publishedLifetime: read-only published link, live until revoked

projectManager.copyProjectIdFailed: Could not copy the project ID from this browser.

completeProfile.title: Add your name
completeProfile.subtitle: Give your account a clear display name for cloud projects and sharing.
completeProfile.description: This is the name TrackDraw will show for cloud projects and shared layouts.
completeProfile.descriptionWithEmail: This is the name TrackDraw will show for cloud projects and shared layouts on {email}.
completeProfile.nameRequired: Please enter the name you want TrackDraw to show.
completeProfile.updateFailed: Failed to update your account name.

newProject.title: New project
newProject.subtitle: Start a blank canvas or pick a starter layout to build on.
newProject.desktopSubtitle: Start a blank canvas or pick a starter layout to build on.
newProject.saveWarningBody: Starting a new project replaces what's on the canvas. Export or back up first if you want to keep it.
newProject.startFreshBody: Clear the field and build your track from scratch.
newProject.exportFirstBody: Save a copy of the current track before starting a new one.

keyboardShortcuts.dialogSubtitle: Available keyboard and canvas shortcuts in the studio.

versionConflict.title: Choose a project version
versionConflict.subtitle: Pick the version you want to keep using on this device.
versionConflict.body: changed on another device while you were signed out. Choose which version you want to keep using on this device.
